name: timm (PyTorch Image Models)

auth.notes: Local library; HuggingFace Hub token for private model weights

performance.notes: Inference speed depends on model size and GPU; timm models often SOTA efficiency

agent_readiness.notes: The largest collection of pretrained PyTorch image models. timm.create_model('resnet50', pretrained=True). 700+ models: EfficientNet, ViT, ConvNeXt, ResNet, DeiT, Swin, RegNet, MaxViT, etc. timm.list_models() to browse. Feature extraction: model.forward_features(). timm.data.resolve_data_config() for preprocessing. Model benchmarking: benchmark.py. HuggingFace Hub integration. Backbone for many CV pipelines. Ross Wightman maintains; used by PyTorch Lightning, mmdetection.

gotchas: 700+ models — choosing the right one requires CV knowledge
Model weights downloaded on first use (~hundreds of MB)
Some models optimized for GPU only
best_when: Image classification fine-tuning with pretrained backbones
Transfer learning for custom CV datasets
Backbone extraction for object detection/segmentation pipelines
avoid_when: Object detection (use Ultralytics YOLO or detectron2)
When Hugging Face transformers provides better model access for vision-language
summary: timm (PyTorch Image Models) is the largest collection of pretrained image classification models. 700+ models including EfficientNet, ViT, ConvNeXt, Swin Transformer, ResNet. timm.create_model('efficientnet_b0', pretrained=True). Feature backbone extraction. HuggingFace Hub integrated. The go-to library for CV transfer learning and SOTA model comparison. Maintained by Ross Wightman at HuggingFace.
